description: Amoonguss and Gourgeist complement each other — Amoonguss is completely walled by Tinkaton (Foul Play and Grass Knot both resisted), while Gourgeist with Incinerate and Shadow Ball provides the direct Tinkaton answer that Amoonguss lacks, allowing Amoonguss to stay in the lead role.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: GOURGEIST is MY GO TO SAFE SWAP | Spring Cup Team | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Explicitly named core from the Spring Cup meta. Their combined typing and coverage formed a dominant pairing that warped the meta, forcing opponents to run Abomasnow as a core breaker.

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Spring Cup great league | Pokemon GO PvP

description: Amoonguss is extremely neutral and can handle most matchups, while Lanturn covers what Amoonguss can't — beating fire types and Empoleon. Together they wall many common threats like opposing Lanturn (walled by Amoonguss) and Empoleon (walled by Lanturn).

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: I used a Subscribers 90% WIN RATE TEAM  | Spring Cup Team | Pokémon GO Battle League

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: LANTURN is the ELO GAINER of SPRING CUP  | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Amoonguss farms energy with Astonish then swap-pivots into Seaking, which the creator calls 'one of the safest Pokémon in the meta' and praises for flip-switch versatility. Multiple battles were won by this pair alone without ever needing the third Pokémon.

sources.author: CalebPeng
sources.videoTitle: AMONG US, I mean AMOONGUSS*, Dominates Spring Cup!!!

description: Lanturn handles the fire, flying, and ice threats that the double grass line is weak to, while Shadow Amoonguss provides ghost/dark coverage with Foul Play and Sledge Bomb. Creator explicitly calls this a recurring core.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: BIG RISK, BIG REWARD Shadow Cacturne | Spring Cup | Pokémon GO

description: Back-line core that the lead (Clefable) tries to align. Empoleon builds energy advantages and shield pressure while Cacturne cleans up, thriving against the meta's Amoonguss and Jellicent users.

sources.author: JonkusPKMN
sources.videoTitle: Win your Battles in NO TIME! This TOXIC TEAM destroys the Spring Cup in Seconds!

description: Steel/Grass + Water/Steel core — Empoleon's water typing covers Ferrothorn's fire weakness, while Empoleon's steel typing offsets the double grass weakness that a pure water partner would have. Double steel provides broad neutral coverage.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: DOUBLE WATER, DOUBLE STEEL COVERS ALL THE META | Spring Cup Team | Pokémon GO

description: Double-water back line the creator explicitly calls a 'core' (says he used it yesterday with Tika Ton). Jellicent provides bulk and ghost damage while Empoleon adds fairy coverage and steel resistances, baiting out opposing water answers.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: SHADOW VICTREEBEL a DAMAGE OUTPUT MACHINE  | Spring Cup Team | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Creator explicitly calls out 'Empoleon Morgrem core' as a cool pairing worth exploring, noting Morgrem's strength against Jellicent and other meta Pokemon.

sources.author: JonkusPKMN
sources.videoTitle: Win your Battles in NO TIME! This TOXIC TEAM destroys the Spring Cup in Seconds!

description: Nasty bait pairing — Tinkaton exists on the team specifically to draw out the Empoleon counter (steel counters), letting Empoleon sweep once its threats are eliminated.

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Spring Cup great league | Pokemon GO PvP

description: Seaking covers all of Ferrothorn's key weaknesses: water typing resists fire, Icy Wind hits grass types super effectively, and Drill Run hits steel and poison types super effectively — the three main threats to Ferrothorn.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: An INSANE COVERAGE UNDERRATED Pokémon | Spring Cup Team  | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Ferrothorn handles Empoleon in the lead (the one Pokemon Togetic struggles against), while Togetic with Heat Wave destroys opposing Ferrothorn. Creator says Ferrothorn in lead is 'kind of necessary' specifically to cover Togetic's Empoleon weakness.

sources.author: JonkusPKMN
sources.videoTitle: FERROTHORN SLAYER! I went 15-0 with *NEW* HEAT WAVE Togetic in the Spring Cup in Pokemon GO

description: Weezing acts as a safe swap covering Ferrothorn's steel weakness with Overheat, since Ferrothorn has nothing for steels. Weezing's poison typing also resists fairy moves that target the team.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: An INSANE COVERAGE UNDERRATED Pokémon | Spring Cup Team  | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Poison/Dark core — they cover each other's weaknesses nearly perfectly. Weezing's fairy typing provides double resistance to fighting for Greninja, and Greninja beats ground types that threaten Weezing. Creator explicitly calls this a 'poison dark core' and says the type combination is 'next to perfect'.

description: Shadow Victreebel pulls an advantage from the safe swap situation, then Gourgeist closes out games by core-breaking the opponent's remaining team with super-effective Incinerates. Victreebel forces shields and energy advantages that Gourgeist capitalizes on.

description: Tinkaton struggles against fire and water types, while Jellicent is one of the best answers to all water Pokémon in the meta. Jellicent covers Tinkaton's key weaknesses, making them a complementary pair.

sources.videoTitle: Underrated GOURGEIST Dominates Spring Cup  | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Shadow Victreebel's acid damage softens opponents for Jellicent's Shadow Ball to clean up. Jellicent also walls the water-type energy that threatens Victreebel.

description: Steel/Fairy + Water/Flying core sharing the same synergy as Klefki/Pelipper — only fire and ground weaknesses, both fully covered by Pelipper's resistances.
